name: planr
description: Skill-driven planning and execution loop for coding agents: one $planr entry point, an autonomous $planr-loop, and evidence-backed task graph skills powered by the planr CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, loop, verify, and close coding work with evidence
interface.longDescription: Planr turns one product idea into a live task graph and drives features to verified completion. $planr routes any request to the right stage skill from live map state; $planr-loop runs work, live verification, and independent review until the map is clean. Requires the planr CLI (brew install instructa/tap/planr).
defaultPrompt: Use $planr to plan a production-ready app from my idea.
Use $planr-loop to ship one feature with verification until done.
